fullText:
Safari Tour is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Vesuviuslandia Park in Naples, Campania, Italy.



Yellow track and brown supports.

The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.


 * Safari Tour on the parks website (In Italian)
